server/src/image_tool/exif/ifd.py :: _type_size
def _type_size(type_id: int) -> int:
    return {
        TYPE_BYTE: 1,
        TYPE_ASCII: 1,
        TYPE_SHORT: 2,
        TYPE_LONG: 4,
        TYPE_RATIONAL: 8,
        TYPE_UNDEFINED: 1,
        TYPE_SLONG: 4,
        TYPE_SRATIONAL: 8,
    }.get(type_id, 0)
